reasoning: Searches from late 2025 and 2026 (well after the July 1, 2025 cutoff) consistently refer to John Fetterman as a Senate Democrat. For instance, a December 2025 NYT report describes him as a Democrat, and a February 2026 report from The Hill explicitly calls him a 'Senate Democrat'. In September 2025, Fetterman gave an interview directly stating 'I am not going to switch. I am just going to be an independent voice in the Democratic Party.' Furthermore, fact-checkers explicitly debunked rumors in early 2026 that he had switched parties. Despite pressure from progressive groups in mid-2025, there is no evidence he ever formally left the caucus, resigned, or switched parties prior to the July 1, 2025 deadline. Because he clearly remained in the Democratic caucus throughout 2025, the probability of him having ceased caucusing before the deadline is exceptionally low.
